member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding Redis resources to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.AddRedis(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Adds a Redis container to the application model.
member.param: The .
The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.
The host port to bind the underlying container to.
member.remarks:
This resource includes built-in health checks. When this resource is referenced as a dependency using the extension method then the dependent resource will wait until the Redis resource is able to service requests.
This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.AddRedis(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ParameterResource})
member.summary: Adds a Redis container to the application model.
member.param: The .
The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.
The host port to bind the underlying container to.
The parameter used to provide the password for the Redis resource. If a random password will be generated.
member.remarks:
This resource includes built-in health checks. When this resource is referenced as a dependency using the extension method then the dependent resource will wait until the Redis resource is able to service requests.
This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithRedisCommander(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisCommanderResource}},System.String)
member.summary: Configures a container resource for Redis Commander which is pre-configured to connect to the that this method is used on.
member.remarks: This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.
member.param: The for the .
Configuration callback for Redis Commander container resource.
Override the container name used for Redis Commander.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithRedisInsight(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisInsightResource}},System.String)
member.summary: Configures a container resource for Redis Insight which is pre-configured to connect to the that this method is used on.
member.remarks: This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.
member.param: The for the .
Configuration callback for Redis Insight container resource.
Override the container name used for Redis Insight.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithHostPort(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisCommanderResource},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Configures the host port that the Redis Commander resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.
member.param: The resource builder for Redis Commander.
The port to bind on the host. If is used random port will be assigned.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithHostPort(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisInsightResource},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Configures the host port that the Redis Insight resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.
member.param: The resource builder for Redis Insight.
The port to bind on the host. If is used random port will be assigned.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithDataVolume(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a Redis container resource and enables Redis persistence.
member.param: The resource builder.
The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

A flag that indicates if this is a read-only volume. Setting this to true will disable Redis persistence.
Defaults to false.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithDataBindMount(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a Redis container resource and enables Redis persistence.
member.param: The resource builder.
The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

A flag that indicates if this is a read-only mount. Setting this to true will disable Redis persistence.
Defaults to false.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithPersistence(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Int64)
member.summary: Configures a Redis container resource for persistence.
member.param: The resource builder.
The interval between snapshot exports. Defaults to 60 seconds.
The number of key change operations required to trigger a snapshot at the interval. Defaults to 1.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithDataVolume(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisInsightResource},System.String)
member.summary: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a Redis Insight container resource.
member.param: The resource builder.
The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithDataBindMount(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisInsightResource},System.String)
member.summary: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a Redis Insight container resource.
member.param: The resource builder.
The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithPassword(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ParameterResource})
member.summary: Configures the password that the Redis resource is used.
member.param: The resource builder.
The parameter used to provide the password for the Redis resource. If , no password will be configured.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.RedisBuilderExtensions.WithHostPort(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Configures the host port that the Redis resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.
member.param: The resource builder.
The port to bind on the host. If is used random port will be assigned.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisCommanderResource
member.summary: A resource that represents a Redis Commander container.
member.param: The name of the resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisCommanderResource.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: A resource that represents a Redis Commander container.
member.param: The name of the resource.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisInsightResource
member.summary: A resource that represents a Redis Insight container.
member.param: The name of the resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisInsightResource.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: A resource that represents a Redis Insight container.
member.param: The name of the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Redis.RedisInsightResource.PrimaryEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the primary endpoint for the Redis Insight.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource
member.summary: A resource that represents a Redis resource independent of the hosting model.
member.remarks: A resource that represents a Redis resource independent of the hosting model.
member.param: The name of the resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: A resource that represents a Redis resource independent of the hosting model.
member.remarks: A resource that represents a Redis resource independent of the hosting model.
member.param: The name of the resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.#ctor(System.String,Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ParameterResource)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the resource.
A parameter that contains the Redis server password.

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.StandardRedisScheme
member.summary: The standard URI scheme registered for Redis, similar to http. See: https://github.com/redis/redis-specifications/blob/1252427cdbc497f66a7f8550c6b5f2f35367dc92/uri/redis.txt

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.TlsRedisScheme
member.summary: The TLS URI scheme registered for Redis, similar to https. See: https://github.com/redis/redis-specifications/blob/1252427cdbc497f66a7f8550c6b5f2f35367dc92/uri/rediss.txt

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.PrimaryEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the primary endpoint for the Redis server.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.Host
member.summary: Gets the host endpoint reference for this resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.Port
member.summary: Gets the port endpoint reference for this resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.PasswordParameter
member.summary: Gets the parameter that contains the Redis server password.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.TlsEnabled
member.summary: Indicates whether TLS is enabled for the Redis server.
member.remarks: This property proxies through to on the . When set to , the connection string expression dynamically includes ,ssl=true and the URI expression uses the rediss:// scheme. This value is resolved lazily at expression evaluation time, avoiding timing issues when TLS is enabled later in the application lifecycle (e.g., during the BeforeStartEvent).

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.Args
member.summary: Arguments for the Dockerfile

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string expression for the Redis server.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.GetConnectionStringAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the connection string for the Redis server.
member.param: A to observe while waiting for the task to complete.
member.returns: A connection string for the redis server in the form "host:port".

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource.UriExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the Redis server.
member.remarks: Format: redis://[:{password}@]{host}:{port}. The password segment is omitted when no password is configured.
